codeQualityIssues.description: extractJson() regex pattern uses non-greedy matching (\{[\s\S]*?}) which may not handle deeply nested JSON with multiple closing braces correctly in some edge cases. The brace fallback (first-{ to last-}) handles this, but the fenced block extraction could miss the full JSON if it ends with }}) for example.

testCoverage: 18 tests total: 6 extractJson variants (raw JSON, ```json fence, ``` fence, preamble brace matching, raw fallback, nested JSON), 4 invoke tests (full flow, observability, markdown handling, model resolution), 2 retry tests (success after failures, exhaustion), 6 MockLlmAdapter tests (4 agent fixtures, override, missing file). Comprehensive coverage.
summary: Well-implemented LLM adapter following the specified design. extractJson handles all 4 required input formats. Retry logic uses Spring RetryTemplate correctly with exponential backoff. MockLlmAdapter provides good test infrastructure. ObservabilityPort integration is clean.
